title: Meeting notes at speed
description: Real meeting notes — bullets, attendees, decisions
text: Meeting: Q3 Planning. Attendees: David, Sarah, Mark, Lisa. Decisions: 1) launch on August 15; 2) increase marketing budget by 20%; 3) hire two more engineers. Action items: Sarah owns the launch checklist; Mark drafts the budget proposal by Friday.

tips.text: Note-taking is real-time speed — no time to re-type
Short fragments + colons + numbers — typical meeting format

tips.target: Meeting: Q3 Planning. Attendees: David, Sarah, Mark, Lisa. Decisions: 1) launch on August 15; 2) increase marketing budget by

tips.text: Practice this until you can type AND listen at the same time

tips.target: 20%; 3) hire two more engineers. Action items: Sarah owns the launch checklist; Mark drafts the budget proposal by Friday.

character_tips.anna: Live note-taking is the ultimate speed test. Train this for any career.
character_tips.maxim: If you can type faster than people talk, you'll never miss a meeting detail.
character_tips.klavochka: Like writing while listening, my dear — focused and quick 🎯
